title: Add error when DPI export multiple tasks with the same name

features.name: dpi export task name collision across modules
features.description: Code should include multiple DPI export task declarations with the same task name in different modules

features.name: dpi export task with 128-bit wide parameter
features.description: Code should include a DPI export task with a 128-bit wide input parameter

features.name: dpi export task with mismatched parameter widths
features.description: Code should include DPI export tasks with the same name but different parameter widths across modules
